vision: agent-utilities is a protocol-first, framework-light agent core library.
mission: Provide production-grade agent orchestration with resilience and observability, bridging memory and deep structural codebase awareness.
quality_gates: All features MUST be implemented with Pytests
Update plan and re-run if issues are found
Do not use for simple single-shot LLM calls
Do not use for UI development
Do not use for SaaS-specific integrations
Do not use for opinionated agent personalities
